title: Russia told Trump it has not shared intelligence with Iran during war, Witkoff says
summary_full: U.S. officials have said Russia has given Iran information that could help its forces strike U.S. military assets in the Middle East, MS Now has reported.
summary_public: U.S. officials have said Russia has given Iran information that could help its forces strike U.S. military assets in the Middle East, MS Now has reported.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russia told Trump it has not shared intelligence with Iran
